description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a round, matte-finished concrete pot with a slightly rough texture. The pot is filled with dark soil from which several woody stems emerge, supporting a modest canopy of broad, oval-shaped green leaves. The plant appears healthy but somewhat sparse, with some leaves drooping and others standing upright, giving it a natural, slightly unkempt look. The roots are partially visible above the soil, adding to the organic appearance. The concrete pot is plain and unadorned, with a subtle, natural gray coloration and no visible decorative patterns. This type of potted plant is commonly found in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, patios, or in office lobbies, serving both decorative and air-purifying purposes.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad green leaves in a plain, round concrete pot. The plant has visible woody stems and roots, giving it a natural, slightly wild appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's broadest leaf spread and the round, plain concrete pot with visible roots and soil.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the sparser side of the plant, with more visible stems and fewer leaves, and the pot's smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: The plant appears more upright from this view, with a clear view of the stems and the pot's even, matte finish.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the root structure above the soil and the dense cluster of leaves on one side, with the pot's texture clearly visible.
